summary: Comprehensive testing of CRM + Pipeline + Customer Base with REAL PostgreSQL persistence. All 24 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows tested and working correctly.

ceo_login.details: CEO user (garcia.rapha2@gmail.com) logs in and redirects to /ceo/overview

pipeline_kanban.details: 6 deal cards displayed across 5 kanban columns (Lead=1, Qualified=1, Proposal=1, Negotiation=1, Closed Won=2). Stage headers show count and total value.

deal_dialog.details: CrmDetailDialog opens with real data (name, email, phone, company, address, plan dropdown, stage dropdown, deal_value, notes). All fields editable.

deal_save.details: Editing deal fields and clicking Save shows 'Saved - Changes saved successfully.' toast. Data persists to PostgreSQL.

activity_log.details: Activity log section shows real activities from DB with dates. Edit and delete icons visible on hover.

add_activity.details: Add Activity button opens form with type dropdown and description input. Saving shows 'Activity added' toast and activity appears in log.

mark_as_won.details: Backend test confirmed: Mark as Won marks deal as closed_won AND creates customer in DB. Toast 'Deal closed!' appears.

customers_page.details: Customer Base page shows 2 customers from PostgreSQL (TEST_Won Company and BrewHouse POA). Table shows company, contact, plan, MRR, status, modules, signup date.

customer_dialog.details: Customer detail dialog shows status dropdown (active/paused/churned) and 8 module toggles (Pulse, Tap, Table, KDS, Bar, Finance, Analytics, AI).

customer_search.details: Search filters customers by company name in real-time.

customer_filters.details: Plan and Status filter dropdowns work correctly.

active_customers_kpi.details: Active Customers KPI click navigates to /ceo/customers?status=active. Shows real count (2) from DB.

theme_toggle.details: Theme toggle changes between dark and light mode correctly.

non_ceo_access.details: Non-CEO user (teste@teste.com) cannot access /ceo routes - redirected to /venue/home

pipeline_search.details: Pipeline search filters deals by company name. Searching 'Bar' shows 2 results (Bar Noite SP, GastroBar BH).

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test deals and customers with TEST_ prefix for Mark as Won flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM + Pipeline + Customer Base fully tested with REAL PostgreSQL persistence. All CRUD operations work. Deal-to-Customer transition (Mark as Won) creates customer automatically. Active Customers KPI shows real count from DB. The old ceoService.js still has mock data for Overview/Revenue/Security/Reports pages, but the CRM (deals, customers, activities) is 100% real via /api/crm/* endpoints.

data_persistence_verified.customers_table: 2+ customers (BrewHouse POA seeded + TEST_Won Company from Mark as Won)
